description.en: Allows web applications to explicitly set default scroll restoration behavior on history navigation. This property can be eitherautoormanual.

excerpt.es: Allows web applications to explicitly set default scroll restoration behavior on history navigation. This property can be eitherautoormanual.
excerpt.en: Allows web applications to explicitly set default scroll restoration behavior on history navigation. This property can be eitherautoormanual.

description.en: Returns ananyvalue representing the state at the top of the history stack. This is a way to look at the state without having to wait for apopstateevent.

excerpt.es: Returns ananyvalue representing the state at the top of the history stack. This is a way to look at the state without having to wait for apopstateevent.
excerpt.en: Returns ananyvalue representing the state at the top of the history stack. This is a way to look at the state without having to wait for apopstateevent.

description.en: Returns a copy of the information that was provided topushState()orreplaceState().
